prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous senior cadre in a navy cloak with gold trim, and Ari Dawncrest, a mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags. Mira reaches forward to carefully adjust the alignment of the magical tags hovering around Ari. The camera maintains a medium shot, capturing their focused, cooperative interaction in the warm, bustling guild environment. Anime RPG art style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Ari Dawncrest nods in concentration as the spell tags stabilize under her control, glowing with a steady, calibrated light. Mira Ledgerfall pulls back, closing her ledger with a satisfied expression, confirming the gear is ready for the expedition. Consistent lighting, character design, and camera angle, no text, no watermark.
